expectations.text: Recommends exchange_calendars as the upgrade target (not pandas_market_calendars or manual implementation)
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 explicitly says 'Add exchange_calendars dependency'. Full SessionDetector class using xcals throughout. No mention of pandas_market_calendars.

expectations.text: Explains that ClickHouse toTimezone() handles DST but NOT holidays/lunch breaks — need Python-side computation
expectations.evidence: Phase 5b: 'The current toTimezone() SQL approach handles DST and weekends but cannot handle holidays or lunch breaks server-side.' Recommends dual-tier: Tier A (server-side, fast, approximate) + Tier B (Python-computed, exact).

expectations.text: Provides concrete migration steps (install lib, replace dicts, replace checks, update tests)
expectations.evidence: 7 explicit phases with code: 1) Add dep, 2) ExchangeConfig registry, 3) SessionDetector class, 4) Integrate into enrichment, 5) CH schema, 6) Update constants, 7) Backfill. Full code examples for each.

expectations.text: References the existing ouroboros.py pattern and explains what it gets right vs what it misses
expectations.evidence: Current State Analysis table maps all 3 files (ouroboros.py, enrich.py, migrations.py). 7-row 'Specific accuracy gaps' table with concrete examples (NYSE 9:30 vs 10:00, etc.).
